revision_summary: Four targeted fixes required: (1) Reframe the 'taxes' interpretation at 01:18/01:24 — 'taxes' is more plausibly a reference to tax credits/incentives relevant to the solar design than garbled filler; the coaching implication built on 'garbled content' should be revised or removed. (2) Correct the handoff_brief.customer_anxiety_profile — remove the inference that Carol may be managing a serious health issue; replace with a neutral scheduling note ('Carol had medical appointments this week — confirm availability at top of Friday call'). (3) Add a missed cherry_pick moment at 01:12 flagging that Parker re-confirmed 'in person' appointment format (wrong format per button_up.phone_appointment_specified) with the gatekeeper a second time — this is a distinct coaching point beyond the general button_up gap already flagged at 00:59. (4) Fix the codex_reference in cherry_pick_moments[1] from coaching_philosophy.curiosity_over_features to coaching_philosophy.setter_scope_discipline — the curiosity_over_features section addresses feature-explanation anti-patterns, not frame ownership in gatekeeper exchanges. The 00:47 moment where Parker proactively proposes 3PM Friday (mild assertiveness) should also be acknowledged to avoid a one-sided 'purely reactive' characterization of rep_intent.
